# Security Policy

## Reporting Security Issues

This is a portfolio repository and does not contain production code. However, if you believe you have found a security issue in any of our public materials, please report it responsibly.

**Please do NOT create a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Instead, please send an email to: **security@disuza.com**

Include the following information:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Any suggested fixes

We will acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and provide a detailed response within 7 days.

## Scope

This security policy applies to:
- This public portfolio repository
- The public website at disuza.com

## Out of Scope

- Third-party services and dependencies
- Social engineering attacks
- Physical security
- Issues already reported

## Recognition

We appreciate responsible disclosure and will acknowledge security researchers who report valid issues (with their permission).

---

Disuza Quantitative Security Team
